calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions; To Remove And Replace Nominated Trustees; For Orders Confirming Amendment To Trust Document; And Confirming A Trust Asset;
Off Calendar Sep-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Peter J Tamases appearing for and with Pamela Hansen. Pat Rock, the broker is also in court. Court reported on the estimate value of the two properties. Court will retain juridiction and sale will be subject to court confirmation. Todd Christensen from Phillips Bonding is in court and he indicated he is prepare to bond Ms. Hansen for up to $1,000,000.00. Court will review the order before signing it.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

Petition For Instructions; To Remove And Replace Nominated Trustees; For Orders Confirming Amendment To Trust Document; And Confirming A Trust Asset;
Off Calendar Aug-30-2007 Continued To Sep-18-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Peter Tamases, attorney for petitioner
The court takes the matter submission.
JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN, REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN,CSR#11722, CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF:J.GUITRON

Petition For Instructions; To Remove And Replace Nominated Trustees; For Orders Confirming Amendment To Trust Document; And Confirming A Trust Asset;
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Continued To Jul-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Tamases for petitioner. Betty Bailey (niece) in pro per. Cecilia Chandler (great niece)in pro.
Materials mailed to the court by Ms Bailey have been returned to her. The court informs Ms Bailey to file the documents she wants the court to review and to notice all other parties. Ms Bailey brings the issue of Ms Johnson's will. The court informs Ms Bailey that the will is not the matter before the court. Ms Johnson is advised to obtain counsel. She is directed to file a declaration with copies of all original documents and to show the original documents to Mr Tamases. The matter is continued to July 31, 2007.
Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy McMath Clerk: Rosie Noguera Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542

Petition For Instructions; To Remove And Replace Nominated Trustees; For Orders Confirming Amendment To Trust Document; And Confirming A Trust Asset;
Off Calendar Jun-26-2007 Continued To Jul-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Peter Tamases appearing for petitioner. Counsel has received the file from Mrs. Sullivan 2 or 3 days ago. He will waive to compel the accounting. There were no asset. He requested to waive the citation to the nominated trustees. It will scare them. Janet will file a declination. The other two are not able to act. He will file an amended petition to include the trust documents. He requested to extend the special trustee and to include to deal with the tenants. Based on counsel's representation, Court is not requiring citation to the nominated trustees. Special trustee's powers is extended. Counsel to prepare the order. Matter is continued to 7/17.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.

Petition For Instructions; To Remove And Replace Nominated Trustees; For Orders Confirming Amendment To Trust Document; And Confirming A Trust Asset;
Off Calendar May-22-2007 Continued To Jun-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions; To Remove And Replace Nominated Trustees; For Orders Confirming Amendment To Trust Document; And Confirming A Trust Asset;
Off Calendar Apr-24-2007 Continued To May-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Peter Tamases appearing for petitoner. Court does no have any problem with California being the proper veneue. Mr. Tamases stated that Ms. Sullivan did not feel comfortable releasing the file unless it is to the successor trustee. He is asking the Court to suspend the powers of the trustee and appoint Ms. Hansenas the temporary acting trustee. Request is granted. Counsel to prepare an order. Matter is continued to 5/22.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Soret-Matley CSR# 9225. Clerk: Ella Yip.
